apps.name: Trending
apps.description: A YouTube-style trending feed: browse popular videos and watch them right on the display.

apps.name: Drive HUD
apps.description: Live driving HUD: speed, posted limit, compass heading, and the next signal or stop ahead (GPS + OpenStreetMap).

apps.name: Hello HUD
apps.description: Minimal heads-up display: a live clock and a greeting you cycle with a pinch.

apps.name: Glance Cards
apps.description: Swipe through a stack of glanceable cards; pinch to expand one.
